document_metadata.title: Smart Skeleton Shimmer Animations with Motion.dev

executive_summary: The website currently uses basic Tailwind `animate-pulse` and `animate-spin` utilities for loading states, resulting in a generic and inconsistent loading experience. This project implements production-grade skeleton shimmer animations using motion.dev (Framer Motion v12) to create smooth, GPU-accelerated loading placeholders that match the site's dark theme. The shimmer effect uses a moving gradient overlay that sweeps across skeleton boxes, providing visual feedback that content is loading. This improves perceived performance and creates a polished, professional feel across all loading states.
problems_identified: No reusable skeleton component — loading UI is copy-pasted across 5+ files
Generic `animate-pulse` lacks the shimmer sweep effect seen in modern apps
Inconsistent loading patterns: spinners, pulse, bounce, rotating divs
No skeleton placeholders for page-level data fetching (blog list, thesis list, etc.)
Click-navigation spinners are visually disconnected from the site's aesthetic
No staggered skeleton loading for lists/grids of cards
ImageWithFallback uses basic pulse instead of shimmer
Card click-loading overlays use identical copy-pasted spinner markup

architecture_strategy.layer_1_skeleton_component: Create a reusable `<SkeletonBox />` component with motion.dev-powered shimmer animation. Uses `motion.div` with `animate` prop for the gradient sweep, no CSS keyframes needed.
architecture_strategy.layer_2_skeleton_groups: Create `<SkeletonCard />` and `<SkeletonGrid />`组合 components for common layouts (blog card, thesis card, gallery card, officer card).
architecture_strategy.layer_3_loading_overlay: Create `<LoadingOverlay />` component to replace the 5x copy-pasted spinner blocks with a consistent shimmer overlay.
architecture_strategy.layer_4_page_skeletons: Add skeleton loading states to data-fetching pages (blog index, thesis index, gallery index, awards) so content has shimmer placeholders while Sanity data loads.
architecture_strategy.layer_5_integration: Replace all existing `animate-pulse` and `animate-spin` loading states with the new shimmer components. Migrate `ImageWithFallback` and `Awards/Card` to use shimmer.

motion_dev_api_usage.shimmer_animation: Use motion.div with animate={{ x: ['-100%', '100%'] }} for the gradient sweep
motion_dev_api_usage.stagger_children: Use motion variants with staggerChildren for grid skeleton loading
motion_dev_api_usage.presence_exit: Use AnimatePresence for smooth skeleton-to-content transitions
motion_dev_api_usage.hardware_acceleration: motion.dev automatically uses GPU-accelerated transforms for optimal performance

functional_requirements: FR1: A reusable SkeletonBox component must render a dark placeholder with a shimmer gradient sweep powered by motion.dev
FR2: The shimmer must use a linear-gradient overlay (transparent → white/20% → transparent) that moves left-to-right on a loop
FR3: SkeletonBox must accept width, height, borderRadius, and className props
FR4: A SkeletonCard component must render a pre-built skeleton matching BlogCard, ThesisCard, GalleryCard, or OfficerCard layouts
FR5: A LoadingOverlay component must replace the 5x copy-pasted spinner blocks with a shimmer overlay
FR6: AnimatePresence must wrap skeleton-to-content transitions for smooth crossfade
FR7: Staggered children animation must be used for grid/list skeleton loading (cards appear one by one)
FR8: All existing animate-pulse loading states must be migrated to shimmer
FR9: Page-level skeleton loading must be added to blog, thesis, gallery, and awards listing pages

execution_milestones.name: SkeletonBox Component — Core Shimmer Building Block
tasks: Create components/ui/SkeletonBox.js with motion.div shimmer animation
Implement linear-gradient overlay with animate={{ x: ['-100%', '100%'] }}
Add props: width, height, borderRadius, className, style
Set default dark theme colors (#242424 base, white/20% shimmer)
Export for use by all skeleton组合 components
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): create SkeletonBox component with motion.dev shimmer animation

execution_milestones.name: SkeletonCard Components — Layout-Specific Skeletons
tasks: Create components/ui/skeletons/SkeletonBlogCard.js
Create components/ui/skeletons/SkeletonThesisCard.js
Create components/ui/skeletons/SkeletonGalleryCard.js
Create components/ui/skeletons/SkeletonOfficerCard.js
Each skeleton must match the exact dimensions of its real counterpart
Use SkeletonBox for image placeholder + text line placeholders
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): create SkeletonCard components for Blog, Thesis, Gallery, and Officer layouts

execution_milestones.name: LoadingOverlay — Replace Copy-Pasted Spinners
tasks: Create components/ui/LoadingOverlay.js with shimmer background
Replace identical spinner markup in Card/Thesis.js, Card/Gallery.js, Card/Blog.js
Replace spinner in ChatBot.js NavigationCard component
Overlay shows shimmer animation instead of spinning border-circle
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): create LoadingOverlay component, replace 4x copy-pasted spinners

execution_milestones.name: SkeletonGrid — Staggered Grid Loading
tasks: Create components/ui/SkeletonGrid.js with staggered children animation
Use motion variants with staggerChildren: 0.1 for grid items
Accept cardType prop ('blog', 'thesis', 'gallery', 'officer') and count prop
Render N skeleton cards with staggered entrance animation
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): create SkeletonGrid with staggered children entrance animation

execution_milestones.name: Migrate ImageWithFallback to Shimmer
tasks: Update components/ui/ImageWithFallback.js to use SkeletonBox instead of animate-pulse
Replace the pulse div with a shimmer skeleton
Keep the same loading/error state logic
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(skeleton): migrate ImageWithFallback from pulse to shimmer loading state

execution_milestones.name: Migrate Awards/Card to Shimmer
tasks: Update components/Awards/Card.js to use SkeletonBox instead of animate-pulse
Replace the pulse overlay with shimmer skeleton
Keep the loaded state fade-in transition
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(skeleton): migrate Awards/Card from pulse to shimmer loading state

execution_milestones.name: Page Skeletons — Blog Listing Page
tasks: Update pages/blog/index.js to show SkeletonGrid while Sanity data loads
Wrap content in AnimatePresence for smooth skeleton→content transition
Show 6 SkeletonBlogCards in grid during loading
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): add skeleton loading state to blog listing page

execution_milestones.name: Page Skeletons — Thesis Listing Page
tasks: Update pages/thesis/index.js to show SkeletonGrid while Sanity data loads
Show 4 SkeletonThesisCards during loading
Use AnimatePresence for smooth transition

execution_milestones.name: Page Skeletons — Gallery Listing Page
tasks: Update pages/gallery/index.js to show SkeletonGrid while Sanity data loads
Show 4 SkeletonGalleryCards during loading
Use AnimatePresence for smooth transition
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): add skeleton loading state to gallery listing page

execution_milestones.name: Page Skeletons — Awards Page
tasks: Update pages/awards.js or layouts/AwardsSection.js to show skeleton during load
Show skeleton carousel cards while award data loads
Use AnimatePresence for smooth transition
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): add skeleton loading state to awards page

execution_milestones.name: Migrate Council Spinner to Shimmer
tasks: Update components/About/SubPages/council.js to use SkeletonOfficerCard
Replace the Framer Motion rotating spinner with shimmer skeleton grid
Show adviser + executive skeletons during data fetch
execution_milestones.commit_message: perf(skeleton): migrate council page spinner to skeleton shimmer loading

execution_milestones.name: AnimatePresence Content Transitions
tasks: Wrap all skeleton→content transitions with AnimatePresence
Add exit animation (opacity: 0, scale: 0.98) to skeleton components
Add enter animation (opacity: 0→1) to real content
Ensure smooth crossfade without layout shift
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): add AnimatePresence transitions for all skeleton→content swaps

execution_milestones.name: Globals CSS — Shimmer Keyframes Backup
tasks: Add @keyframes shimmer to globals.css as fallback for non-motion contexts
Add .skeleton-shimmer utility class
Ensure the shimmer gradient matches the motion.dev animation
Keep for cases where motion.dev is not suitable (SSR, static elements)
execution_milestones.commit_message: feat(skeleton): add CSS shimmer keyframes as fallback for non-motion contexts

execution_milestones.name: AGENTS.md Documentation Update
tasks: Document SkeletonBox, SkeletonCard, SkeletonGrid, LoadingOverlay in AGENTS.md
Add skeleton component usage guidelines
Document motion.dev shimmer animation pattern
Add guidelines for when to use skeleton vs spinner
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(skeleton): document skeleton shimmer architecture and component guidelines

execution_milestones.name: PRD Status Update
tasks: Mark all slices as completed in prd-skeleton.json
Add commit history for all slices
Update status to Implemented
execution_milestones.commit_message: docs(prd): mark all skeleton shimmer slices as implemented

success_criteria.shimmer_effect: All skeleton boxes show a smooth left-to-right gradient sweep powered by motion.dev
success_criteria.no_pulse: Zero remaining animate-pulse usage for loading states (replaced by shimmer)
success_criteria.no_spinner: Zero copy-pasted spinner blocks (replaced by LoadingOverlay)
success_criteria.staggered_entrance: Grid/list skeletons stagger their entrance with 0.1s delay between items
success_criteria.smooth_transition: AnimatePresence ensures no jarring snap between skeleton and real content
success_criteria.dark_theme_match: Skeleton colors (#242424 base, white/20% shimmer) match the site's dark theme
success_criteria.gpu_accelerated: All shimmer animations use transform (GPU-accelerated) via motion.dev
success_criteria.consistent_patterns: All loading states across the site use the same skeleton component family
